novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The orchestrator handoff says the named literature checklist is missing; §5 reconstructs a plausible survey, but the required per-flagship checklist with author/year/venue/bibkey/claim/result mapping was not emitted.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add the missing literature checklist as a compact table mapping Leung2022ANI, Leung2023NCRI, BasseDingFellerToulis2024, GaoDing2025Network, PuelzBasseFellerToulis2022, WeinsteinNevo2026, and Savje2024MisspecifiedExposure to the exact §8 result they threaten.
Make the flagship optimization visibly non-tautological by specifying the dimension, variables, and constraints of C_n(eta) and Delta_eta for one canonical network-experiment design class.

Add one worked non-oracle boundary example computing Delta_eta=0 versus Delta_eta>0 for a small group-formation or graph-distance design, so the iff frontier is not only stated as an operator-norm definition.

recommended_next_step: Revise by emitting the required named literature checklist and making the observable cone program operational enough for the flagship equivalence claim.
